pearl_biomes.title: Collect Ender Pearls from 8 different Enderman Overhaul biome variants (each biome gives different behavior)

pearl_stack.title: Stockpile 32 Ender Pearls before entering the End

subtitle.text: They were here before the portal existed. They will be here after you go through.

description: Enderman Overhaul adds 20+ biome-specific Enderman variants.
Each biome variant has different behaviors, appearances, and sometimes drops.
They are not enemies — they are the natives.
Collect pearls from endermen in at least 8 different biomes:
Forest, Desert, Swamp, Jungle, Mesa/Badlands, Frozen, Warped Forest, Mushroom Island.
The Warped Forest variant is particularly relevant — it lives nearest to the portal energy.
32 pearls before entering is the minimum safe carry.
You will use them for mobility on the central island.
The Ender Dragon fights dirty and has a large arena.
The Magical Enderman variant remains unclassified.
If you encounter one, observe before engaging.
→ Collect pearls from 8 different biome Endermen [check]
